title: sum(distinct substring()) does not give warnings, while sum(substring() does
description:
This does not give warnings:
select sum(distinct substring("text", 1, 3)) from dual;
while this does:
select sum(substring("text", 1, 3)) from dual;

I would expect both returning the same warning.
How to repeat:
mysql> select sum(substring("text", 1, 3)) from dual;
+------------------------------+
| sum(substring("text", 1, 3)) |
+------------------------------+
|                            0 |
+------------------------------+
1 row in set, 1 warning (0,00 sec)

mysql> select sum(distinct substring("text", 1, 3)) from dual;
+---------------------------------------+
| sum(distinct substring("text", 1, 3)) |
+---------------------------------------+
|                                     0 |
+---------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0,00 sec)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, text_column String, num_column Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column, num_column) VALUES (1, 'example', 10), (2, 'text', NULL), (3, 'sample', 20);
SELECT sum(distinct substring(text_column, 1, 3)) + if(num_column IS NULL, 0, num_column) FROM test_table;
